title: bidens fistulosa
intro: Bidens fistulosa, also known as the bur marigold or tickseed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bidens fistulosa are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Bidens fistulosa can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
